plugins.name: cribsheet
plugins.description: Persistent markdown memory + a code symbol index (concept/name lookup, call graph, references, learnings) for your AI. Registers the crib MCP server via sharedserver (respects a global install; skip with CRIB_EXTERNAL) and carries the reach-for-crib instructions.

plugins.name: cribsheet-instructions
plugins.description: Instructions only — the 'prefer the code index over grep, consult/store memory' directives, injected each session. No MCP registration. For when crib's tools already reach you another way (e.g. via mcp-combiner).
